title: Gourmet Grilled Algerian Tabasco Sauce Stir-fry
description: A floral and juicy Algerian dish featuring tabasco sauce, perfect for a relaxed brunch.

ingredients.name: Tabasco sauce
ingredients.notes: Use a high-quality Algerian tabasco sauce for the best flavor.

instructions: Heat the comal over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on both sides, about 6 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the comal and set aside.
Add the olive oil, red onion, red bell pepper, and zucchini to the comal.
Cook until the vegetables are tender, about 4 minutes.
Add the garlic, paprika, and salt to the comal and cook for 1 minute.
Add the bulgur to the comal and cook for 2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the tabasco sauce to the comal and stir to combine.
Return the chicken to the comal and stir to combine with the sauce.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the chicken is cooked through.
Garnish with fresh parsley and serve hot.
